title: Nursery Rhyme. DLII. Natural History.
content:
In the month of February,
            When green leaves begin to spring,
        Little lambs do skip like fairies,
            Birds do couple, build, and sing.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DLII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
